description: A retrieval failure is debugged as a generation problem (or vice versa), so effort is spent on the wrong stage.
body: Failure mode: a wrong answer is fixed by tuning the prompt when the supporting passage was never retrieved, or by re-chunking when the passage was present but ignored, so the real gap stays open. Detection signals: no check of whether a supporting passage was retrieved before fixing; chunking changes that do not move recall; prompt changes that do not help because retrieval missed. Do not change a stage before confirming it is the failing one. Safer fallback: attribute each failure as retrieval (missing passage) or generation (passage present but ignored), confirm with the retrieved set, and fix at the lowest failing stage with a regression test.
